patternSummary.proofHeuristic: The tight-row witnesses do not share one common matching core; split the symbolic construction by outsider residue and saturated side.

symbolicUse.constructionTarget: Replace Hopcroft-Karp replay with a residue/block injection that saturates the smaller compatible side of H_{x,N}.
symbolicUse.proofHint: Each witness records actual missing-cross matching pairs. A human/prover lane should look for a residue-parametric injection from the smaller compatible side into squarefree cross pairs.
symbolicUse.nextExtractor: Generalize from these tight-row pair residues into a symbolic side-saturation lemma, then rerun this miner for any newly tight prime family.

boundary.note: This artifact reconstructs matching witnesses for selected bounded threat rows. It does not certify rows outside the source verifier range and does not prove the all-N matching lemma.
boundary.promotionRule: Promote D2/D3 only after the observed matching pattern is replaced by a symbolic construction and checked against the structural-lift atom.
